items.title: The New Orleans Pelicans have exercised their third-year, $2.30 million team option for the 2026-27 season on forward Karlo Matković. He averaged 5.7 points on 60.4% shooting from the field and 42.2% from 3-point range with 3.7 rebounds in 62 games played last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The New Orleans Pelicans have exercised their third-year, $2.30 million team option for the 2026-27 season on forward Karlo Matković. He averaged 5.7 points on 60.4% shooting from the field and 42.2% from 3-point range with 3.7 rebounds in 62 games played last season.

items.title: The Pelicans announce they have exercised the team option on Karlo Matkovic
items.author: Shamit Dua
